deal.notes: Both closing statements are the SAME property. Buy side = FINAL (closed 11/7/2025). Sell side = ESTIMATED (closing 6/19/2026).

taxonomy._comment: IA-aligned taxonomy (MASTER IA v4.1). Closing-tab Category/Sub dropdowns map each statement line to one IA bucket. 'sides' filters which Categories show per closing tab (buy = Purchase + Loans; sell = Loans + Gross Profits). Auto/total IA rows are intentionally not mapping targets.

taxInputs._comment: EDITABLE. Drives transfer tax, county proration, and supplemental. Verify the rate against the actual county secured bill for APN 0440-071-20.
taxInputs.transferTaxSource: CA documentary transfer tax, county base. $1.10 per $1,000. Apple Valley adds no city transfer tax. Verified: $460,000 x 1.10/1000 = $506.00, matches sell-side statement.
taxInputs.annualTaxRateSource: PLACEHOLDER 1.10% base. 92307 effective rate ~1.14% incl. bonds per assessor area. Confirm TRA rate off the actual secured bill. Tooltip shows APN 0440-071-20, San Bernardino County.
taxInputs.dayCountSource: Escrows used 30/360. Verified: $1,562.40 semi-annual / 180 x 54 days (11/7->1/1) = $468.72 exact; /180 x 12 days (6/18->6/30) = $104.16 exact.
taxInputs.priorAssessedValueNote: NEEDED for supplemental calc. If null, supplemental estimated as (purchasePrice - priorAssessedValue) x rate. Default estimate uses priorAssessedValue = 60% of purchase price if left null.
taxInputs.supplementalNote: Supplemental = (purchase price - prior assessed value) x annual rate x month-of-closing proration factor. A SECOND supplemental bill applies when the reassessment spans two fiscal years (closing in months Jan-May per the old factor table). On Ramona this is most of the profit -- workbook Summary note: 'Need Supplemental Tax EST from Tony'.

buySide.title: Buyer's Final Settlement Statement
buySide._comment: Transcribed verbatim from the Buyer's Final Settlement Statement. Flat array kept (index-stable); each line carries the statement's debit or credit. Totals tie to 386,230.45 / 386,230.45.

lines.label: Total Consideration
lines.why: Contract purchase price. QB acquisition basis $308,000 = $300,000 + $8,000 assignment fee (see Other Debits/Credits).

lines.label: Deposit from ZBUYERZ LLC FBO SPG Home Buyers LLC
lines.why: Earnest-money deposit credit held FBO SPG (the assignor). Buyer funds applied toward purchase — a credit, not an added cost. Confirm GL treatment.

lines.label: Deposit from ZBUYERZ LLC
lines.why: Buyer cash deposit credit that balances the statement. Not an added cost; verify GL treatment.

lines.label: New 1st Trust Deed - Kiavi Funding Inc.
lines.why: Kiavi loan proceeds. Includes the $63,000 construction holdback (debited separately below). Financing in — not income, not a cost.

lines.label: Origination Charge to Kiavi Funding Inc.
lines.why: Loan origination charge — cost of money. Interest / Origination.

lines.label: Service Fee to Kiavi Funding Inc.
lines.why: Lender service fee -> Interest / Lender Fees.

lines.label: Construction Holdback to Kiavi Funding Inc.
lines.why: Loan funds held by lender, released as rehab draws. Profit-neutral; funds rehab (already a cost line). Do NOT double-count.

lines.label: Interest on Principal Balance at $89.41/day from 11/07/2025 to 12/01/2025 to Kiavi Funding Inc.
lines.why: First-period per-diem interest ($89.41/day x 24 days). Holding / Interest cost.

lines.label: County Taxes at $1,562.40/semi-annually from 11/07/2025 to 01/01/2026
lines.why: 30/360: $1,562.40 / 180 x 54 days = $468.72 exact. County ad-valorem proration (not supplemental).

lines.label: EHomes Inc
lines.why: Commission / fee to EHomes Inc on the buy side -> Settlement / Commission.

lines.label: Christian Perez Notary Services
lines.why: Notary fee -> Settlement / Other.

lines.label: SPG Home Buyers LLC for Assignment Fee
lines.why: Assignment fee to SPG. QB acquisition basis $308K = $300K + this $8K.

lines.label: Title - Lender's Title Insurance
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Lender's title policy -> Settlement / Title.

lines.label: Title - Binder Policy
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Title binder -> Settlement / Title.

lines.label: Title - Sub Escrow Fee
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Sub-escrow fee charged by title company; could also be Escrow. Defaulted to Title.

lines.label: Title - Endorsement Fee
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Title policy endorsement -> Settlement / Title.

lines.label: Title - Messenger Fee
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Title messenger fee -> Settlement / Title.

lines.label: Title - Recording Service Fee
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Recording service fee -> Settlement / Recording.

lines.label: Recording Grant Deed
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Grant deed recording -> Settlement / Recording.

lines.label: Recording Trust Deed
lines.section: TITLE/TAXES/RECORDING CHARGES - Ticor Title Company of California
lines.why: Trust deed recording -> Settlement / Recording.

lines.label: Title - Escrow Fee
lines.section: ESCROW CHARGES - Autumn Skye Escrow Services, Inc.
lines.why: Base escrow fee -> Settlement / Escrow.

lines.label: Title - Loan Tie-In Fee
lines.section: ESCROW CHARGES - Autumn Skye Escrow Services, Inc.
lines.why: Loan tie-in handled by escrow -> Settlement / Escrow.

lines.label: Title - Overnight Fee
lines.section: ESCROW CHARGES - Autumn Skye Escrow Services, Inc.
lines.why: Escrow overnight / courier -> Settlement / Escrow.

lines.label: Title - Wire Fee
lines.section: ESCROW CHARGES - Autumn Skye Escrow Services, Inc.
lines.why: Escrow wire fee -> Settlement / Escrow.

lines.label: Title - Document Preparation
lines.section: ESCROW CHARGES - Autumn Skye Escrow Services, Inc.
lines.why: Escrow document preparation -> Settlement / Escrow.

lines.label: Title - Electronic Storage Fee
lines.section: ESCROW CHARGES - Autumn Skye Escrow Services, Inc.
lines.why: Escrow electronic-storage fee -> Settlement / Escrow.

lines.label: Total Refund
lines.why: Balancing refund line shown in the Debits column. Confirm whether this is a refund TO the buyer; GL treatment may net out.

sellSide.title: Seller's Estimated Settlement Statement
sellSide._comment: ESTIMATED resale. Line order preserved (0=Sale,1=Commission,2=Transfer Tax,3=Tax Proration) so IA source-links stay valid. Replace with the actual seller statement when issued. cashOutOfEscrow = MASTER IA v4.1 'Cash out of escrow' (G56); reconciled against the statement net proceeds — shown as-is, math not forced.

lines.label: Sale Price
lines.why: Contract resale price (credit to seller).

lines.label: Real Brokerage Commission
lines.why: 2% of $460,000 = $9,200 selling commission -> Settlement / Commission.

lines.label: Documentary Transfer Tax
lines.why: $460,000 x $1.10/$1,000 = $506.00 county documentary transfer tax. Auto-computed in the Resale Tax block.

lines.label: Property Tax Proration (2nd half)
lines.why: Seller's share of unpaid 2nd-half taxes prorated to COE. Verify against bill.

lines.label: Kiavi Loan Payoff
lines.why: Payoff of the same $371K Kiavi loan from the buy side. Profit-neutral.

lines.label: Loan Interest (payoff)
lines.why: Accrued interest to payoff date -> Interest.

lines.label: Pad / TC / Property-ID Fees
lines.why: Misc closing fees (TC, property ID, pad). Confirm exact lines + amounts from the issued statement.

ia._comment: FULL MASTER IA v4.1 model. Every field present. 'input' fields are editable (the old gray cells); everything else is computed live by computeIA() in index.html. Defaults below reproduce the 1834 Colorado SB example EXACTLY (Net Profit $54,042.80 / ROI 17.00% / IRR 51.43%), so you can see the rebuilt model ties out to your screenshot. Change inputs to run any deal.

_fieldNotes.overrideLoanAmt: Blank = use computed 1st loan = the LOWER of (arvLoanPct x ARV) and (costLoanPct x all-in cost, repairs baked in). Enter a number to override.
_fieldNotes.buyersAgentPct: Master showed 2% in the % column but $0 in the dollar column in estimate mode (commissions only book at Final). Default 0 to match the screenshot output; this was flagged issue #8 (decorative % vs live rate).
_fieldNotes.taxFactorW23: Supplemental Tax factor. BLANK in master => supplemental = 0. Enter the county factor to activate Supplemental Tax (B38).
_fieldNotes.proratedTaxResaleRate: B47 uses 1.175%/12*months on purchase price. This is the master's resale prop-tax proration; verify against the actual bill.
